name: Mushroom Turkey Burgers
recipeIngredient: 16 Ounces LOUIS RICH Ground Turkey thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. MIX turkey, parsley, Worcestershire sauce, and onion salt in a large bowl.
2. SHAPE the turkey mixture into 4 patties, each about 4 inches in diameter. Set aside.
3. MELT butter in a large skillet over medium heat. ADD mushrooms; cook and stir for 2 to 3 minutes, or until tender. REMOVE mushrooms from the skillet and cover to keep warm. ADD patties to the skillet; cook on medium heat for 12 to 14 minutes, turning occasionally.
4. SERVE the patties in buns and top with the cooked mushrooms.
